job_scores.reasoning: Excellent fit — candidate shipped production AI agents at Burnt (YC S25) using Claude Sonnet+RAG and built dual-model Claude pipeline for internshipmatcher.com; directly maps to AI/ML development work.

Weak fit — role requires Platform/DevOps (K8s, CI/CD, infrastructure); candidate built Grafana dashboards but resume shows application development, not ops/infrastructure work.
Weak fit — infrastructure role requires systems/ops expertise; candidate's Grafana work is limited and resume centers on full-stack/AI application development, not infrastructure engineering.

Excellent fit — candidate shipped AI agents at Burnt (Claude+RAG, 1,000+ orders), dual-model pipeline at internshipmatcher.com, and Cold Leads Agent; production AI work maps exactly to AI Engineer role.

Decent fit — candidate has strong full-stack skills (React+Python+TypeScript) and shipped production work, but Forward Deployed SE often requires client-facing/consulting skills not demonstrated on resume.
Strong fit — candidate built FastAPI backends at Burnt and internshipmatcher.com with PostgreSQL+Redis; backend focus and San Jose location align perfectly with demonstrated production work.
Strong fit — generic SWE role in SF suits candidate's full-stack production experience (React+Python at Burnt, TypeScript+FastAPI at internshipmatcher.com); broad skill set matches broad role.
